screens.title: DEFAULT_EMAIL_SLIDESHOW_NOTIFICATION
screens.description: Template for Default Email Slideshow Notification

config.content:
Dear Customer,

We're excited to share with you the complete process you've been waiting for, now conveniently packaged in a dynamic slideshow presentation!

In this presentation, you'll find a detailed walkthrough of each step, complete with visuals and explanations to guide you every step of the way. Whether you're looking to streamline your workflow, enhance efficiency, or simply gain a better understanding of the process, this presentation has got you covered.

To access your personalized slideshow presentation, simply click on the link below:
{{slideshowName}}

Feel free to review the presentation at your own pace and reach out to us if you have any questions or need further assistance. We're here to support you throughout your journey.

Thank you for choosing us to be part of your process improvement journey. We're excited to see the impact this presentation will have on your work.

Best regards,

config.helper: Order in which a user will move focus from one control to another by pressing the Tab key
